     The Numbers Business Report

Terrifier 3 (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $53,981,071Details
International Box Office $22,355,421
Worldwide Box Office $76,336,492
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After surviving Art the Clown’s Halloween massacre, Sienna and her brother are struggling to rebuild their shattered lives. As the holiday season approaches, they try to embrace the Christmas spirit and leave the horrors of the past behind. But just when they think they’re safe, Art the Clown returns, determined to turn their holiday cheer into a new nightmare. The festive season quickly unravels as Art unleashes his twisted brand of terror, proving that no holiday is safe.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,928,113 (35.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.85 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:70.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$2,000,000 (worldwide box office is 38.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,514 opening theaters/2,762 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $57,083,430

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 11th, 2024 (Wide) by Iconic/Cineverse
International Releases: October 9th, 2024 (Wide) (France)
October 10th, 2024 (Wide), released as Terrifier 3 (Ужасающий 3) (Russia (CIS))
October 10th, 2024 (Wide) (Croatia)
October 11th, 2024 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 11th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: November 26th, 2024 by Cinedigm
MPA Rating: Not Rated
Running Time: 125 minutes
Franchise: Terrifier
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): New York, United States
Plot point: Cliffhanger Ending, Hallucinations, Killer Clowns, Lone Survivor
Release detail: Christmas in November
Social setting: Christmas
Subgenre: Christmas Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Dark Age Cinema, Fuzz on the Lens Productions, Bloody Disgusting
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

After surviving Art the Clown’s Halloween massacre, Sienna and her brother are struggling to rebuild their shattered lives. As the holiday season approaches, they try to embrace the Christmas spirit and leave the horrors of the past behind. But just when they think they’re safe, Art the Clown returns, determined to turn their holiday cheer into a new nightmare. The festive season quickly unravels as Art unleashes his twisted brand of terror, proving that no holiday is safe.
